Text.Page:
The ancient dragon Skulregnath has become a symbol of death to us. Now, it's working with the nagas to resurrect Dagon—in return for everlasting life!

Eternal life for Skulregnath means eternal terror for us! Break through the shield and kill that monster before it happens.

Heiatha at Camp Venom will guide you there.

The ancient dragon Skulregnath has joined with the argons?

We have to hurry. My brother Mallon knows all about the dragons—when he's not wandering about lost.

Look around Raintree Oasis for a dull-looking high elf. That's him. Tell him I sent you, and he'll tell you all about the Skulregnath.

Skulregnath? The ancient dragon Skulregnath?

I see…I noticed that he disappeared recently. He wanted the everlasting life…

Skulregnath's minions built a teleportal on the temple grounds. It's locked, but it will open if you're carrying one of its scales. Here, take this one.

Good hunting!
(This is the teleportal linked to Sigil Adstringo.)
